questionHtml:
Ronald lives in New York City and wishes to fly to each of the other cities, before finally returning to New York City. After some research, he finds that there exists a direct flight between Los Angeles and Dallas costing $26. He updates the graph to show this.

Explain why the graph can be described as “connected”, but not “complete”.
markschemeHtml:
any city can be travelled to or from any other city (so is connected)          R1

 

EITHER

but there is no direct flight between Los Angeles and Dallas (for example)          R1

OR

but not every vertex has degree 4          R1

 

Note: Accept equivalent statements for the cities being connected and the graph not being complete.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Explain why the graph can be described as “connected”, but not “complete”.
